title: Junior Suite | Hotel Terraza del Pacífico
desc: Junior Suite with King bed and premium view in Playa Hermosa. An elegant space for a romantic beachfront getaway.

Junior Suite

Exclusivity, Comfort, and Unforgettable Views

Main pool view | Upper floor | Only 2 rooms available

Capacity

2 persons

Size

32 m²

Beds

1 King Size

Description

Elevate your stay with one of the most sought-after accommodations at Terraza del Pacifico. With only two Junior Suites available in the entire resort, this exclusive retreat offers privacy, comfort, and front-row views of our iconic illuminated pool from a spacious upper-floor setting.

Designed with couples in mind, each suite features a luxurious king-size bed and a private balcony where you can relax with your morning coffee, unwind with an evening cocktail, and soak in the warm tropical breezes of Playa Hermosa. This is your sanctuary—where every detail is designed to create moments you will never forget.

Exclusivity. Comfort. Views that take your breath away.

Amenities
Air Conditioning

✨ Includes spacious balcony with armchairs for relaxation
